calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar.
EXAMINER: AEYOUNG KIM

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt Huysentruyt for petitioner Linda Bailey (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing regarding status on close of estate.

The Court inquired about the status of the administration. Mr. Huysentruyt reported that the sole asset of the estate consists of proceeds from an annuity that had escheated to the State of California and that the personal representative had recently received a check from the State Controller's Office. Counsel stated that the estate assets are cash and that the services of a probate referee will not be required.

Mr. Huysentruyt further reported that he had e-filed a request for additional time to complete the administration and indicated that he intends to prepare the inventory and a petition for distribution.

The Court continued the matter to June 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared via zoom for Linda Bailey (petitioner).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that his client received a check from the State Controller's office for an annuity, that he doesn't know the amount of the check, and that he has tried to contact his client was but has been unsuccessful. Counsel requests a brief continuance. The matter is continued to March 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Cindee Mayfield. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-09-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kury Huysentruyt appeared via zoom for Linda Bailey (petitioner).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated the six gift trust beneficiaries were satisfied, and that Ms. Judith Ratto is deceased.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated April 26, 2001 is admitted to probate. Linda Bailey is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.
